name: Honey Cake
description: Seven handmade layers with our signature honey cream — caramelized and fragrant, soft in the middle.

name: Basque Cheesecake
description: Intentionally burnt for the nutty flavor, impossibly creamy and smooth, no apology.

name: Sakura Lychee Chiffon
description: A barely-there floral note in a cloud-light chiffon. Subtler than you expect.

name: Fresh Strawberry Chiffon
description: Airy chiffon with house-made preserves and handfuls of fresh strawberry, no extracts.

name: Fresh Mango Chiffon
note: Seasonally at it's best, made to order
description: Soft, sweet mango with fresh milk cream

name: Shokupan
description: Pillowy, stringy milk bread. Best eaten the day it's made.

name: Lemon Raspberry Chiffon
description: Our airy chiffon with our house-made lemon curd and raspberry preserves

name: Matcha Basque
description: All the malted character of matcha in a barely-set basque — warm, bitter-edged, good.
